column5: I love these silly little guys and their immense filmmaking talent so, so much, especially as of recent. Deadpan humor, clear mastery in the tropes of every genre, bursting personality, effective emotional beats and portrayals of depression, a bizarre but deep understanding of America... what the fuck more could you ask for? Even despite some misfires, I can comfortably call them two of the best filmmakers of this generation.
